title: Canistropsis elata
taxonomy: Canistropsis elata is a species within the family Bromeliaceae. This family includes a diverse group of plants commonly known as air plants or tillandsia. The Bromeliaceae family is part of the order Poales, which encompasses various flowering plants. The Poales order is further classified within the class Liliopsida, also known as monocotyledons. These plants share characteristics such as having one cotyledon during seed germination.
